name: George Hotz
tagline: AI, hardware, startups, and contrarian takes
description: Exploring geohot's writings on AI, tinygrad, hardware, economics, and technology.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by George Hotz (geohot), founder of comma.ai and tinygrad. He's known for hacking the iPhone and PS3, and for having strong, contrarian opinions about AI, technology, economics, and society.

spiciness.contextPrompt: George Hotz is known for provocative, contrarian takes on AI development, big tech, government, and society. He often challenges mainstream narratives and doesn't shy away from controversial opinions.
